lesson.menu_title: At Work -- My Job at Biodelta
lesson.menu_desc: Describe your job and workday -- simple present work verbs -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- At Work: My Job at Biodelta
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 5 -- At Work: My Job at Biodelta

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Sofia. Let me tell you about my job. I work in a big office in the city. I am a manager. Every day, I start work at nine o'clock and I finish at half past five. I work with five colleagues. We work on many projects together. In the morning, I answer my emails and I write a report. In the afternoon, I have meetings with my team. I love my job, because every day is different.

Hello, I am Marcos. I want to tell you about my workday. I am a teacher. I work in a small school near my house. I start at seven o'clock in the morning. I teach four classes every day. I do not work in an office; I work in a classroom. After my classes, I answer the phone and I help the new students. I finish at three o'clock. My job is hard, but I am happy, because I help young people every day.

extra_audio.text: First, she starts work at eight o'clock. Second, she answers her emails. Third, she writes a report. Fourth, she works on the project with her colleague. Fifth, she finishes at five o'clock.
